summary: Voice Notes feature testing complete. Backend: 10/10 tests passed (100%). All CRUD operations verified: GET returns array, POST creates note with audio_url/transcript/duration/created_at, DELETE removes notes, duration validation rejects >120s. Voice notes appear as contact_events with event_type='voice_note'. Fixed minor bug: voice_note events now include category/icon/color fields for proper green mic icon display in activity feed. Frontend: Voice Notes section renders on contact detail page with 'Record a Voice Note' button (green mic icon). Activity Feed shows Voice Note events.

minor.issue: Audio URL sometimes returns empty when object storage upload issues occur (handled gracefully)

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: voice_note contact_events now include category='voice_note', icon='mic', color='#34C759' for proper frontend icon rendering
Frontend Voice Notes section only renders on web (Platform.OS === 'web') at line 889 - this is correct as MediaRecorder is web-only
MAX_RECORDING_SECONDS = 120 correctly enforced in both frontend (line 185) and backend (line 23)
Voice notes properly sorted by newest first via .sort('created_at', -1) at line 159
Whisper transcription gracefully handles failures (returns empty string) at line 62
seed_data_creation: Created test voice notes during pytest (auto-cleaned up)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Voice Notes feature fully tested in iteration 51. Backend endpoints: GET /api/voice-notes/{user_id}/{contact_id}, POST (multipart form with audio file + duration), DELETE /{note_id}. Frontend: voice-notes-section renders only on web, uses MediaRecorder API. Activity feed shows voice_note events with green mic icon. The fix in this iteration ensures new voice_note events have proper category/icon/color fields.

bug_fix_applied.description: Added category='voice_note', icon='mic', color='#34C759' to contact_events document so frontend activity feed displays green mic icon instead of default flag icon

mocked_apis.whisper_transcription: May fail on fake audio files but endpoint handles gracefully
